title: Kuma’s Life as a Buccaneer
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, York, Bonney, Unknown person #6, Ivankov as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: NGGHH HANN...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UWAAA AGHH...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UGGHA AAAH...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They have no idea you're taking on any of their pain, kumachi...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you keep doing this, week after week!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It can't be helped.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: IF SOME- ONE DOESN'T SHOULDER THEIR BURDENS...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That pain and suffering of theirs won't just disappear.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be left to fester, returning to haunt them again and again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: More than anything, I'm just glad...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I can do something to help them feel happier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry for putting you through this though. I'll get tougher, so you won't have to worry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's not the point!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, we got a little food as thanks today,

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: Let's eat up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Woo-hoo! Dinner time!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: 25 YEARS AGO (when Kuma was 22)

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Hey, Kumachi, let's get married!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: H-Huh...?! we can't!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell's with that reaction?! of course we can!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You love me, right?! Just admit it, you Dope!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wouldn't it make you happy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure it would, but the thing is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just take me! I'm the one with buccaneer blood!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My wife is normal!! Please let her and my son go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I don't want to make YOU unhappy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: L-Look at this! It's another article about those *Freedom fighters.*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They finally issued wanted posters for them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...After they incited riots in several countries!

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: "Dragon..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's so cool, he's like a hero.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One day, I wanna head out to sea...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and dedicate my life to saving people too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Heeee- Eeello! is anyone home?!

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: Ginny, our sweet muse!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We had a massive haul today! Please help yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Thanks so much, Mr. Fish- monger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ouch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: idiot.

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
